data.title: How Isolating Banner Help?
data.summary: In many systems, updating campaigns, adjusting messaging, or testing layouts requires theme edits, deployment coordination, and regression risk. What should move weekly often moves monthly with fear to introduce bugs.

sections.title: Where friction appears
items: Campaign updates require mixed coordination for each concerns involved (creative, responsiveness, UX, optimisation)
Animation logic interferes with global scripts
Performance cost is bundled into the global theme

sections.title: What isolation changes
items: Campaign content defined via structured contract
Loaded only when present on the page

data.closing: Campaign execution becomes iterative — not infrastructural.
